message:
Running command: # Copy updated gpio_seq to design root tb also
cp /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_gpio_seq.vh \
   /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/

# Verify GPIO test with fixed values
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
  -DTEST_SEQ_GPIO \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -o /tmp/test_gpio2.vvp 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "compile EXIT: $?"
timeout 30 /tmp/test_gpio2.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "GPIO_SEQ|SMOKE_MISMATCH|PASS|FAIL|SMOKE_SUMMARY"
